description: MetricsEnricher — param_count, lines, return_count, branch_count, member_count, and goto_count (0 in Rust), on forgeql-pub.frozen. throw_count/goto_count C-specifics covered in a C-context suite.

cases.name: param_count
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='format_node_id' WHERE param_count=3 LIMIT 5

cases.name: lines_span
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='split_node_offset' WHERE lines=29 LIMIT 5

cases.name: return_count
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='split_node_offset' WHERE return_count=4 LIMIT 5

cases.name: zero_return
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='format_node_id' WHERE return_count=0 LIMIT 5

cases.name: branch_count
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='split_node_offset' WHERE branch_count=4 LIMIT 5

cases.name: member_count_struct
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/result.rs' WHERE name='SessionStats' WHERE member_count=17 LIMIT 5

cases.name: negative_no_goto_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE goto_count>=1 LIMIT 5
